channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: The Trump administration is canceling a lease held by Duke E…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: The Trump administration is canceling a lease held by Duke Energy off the coast of North Carolina as it expands its campaign to block new offshore wind developments.
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration is canceling a lease held by Duke Energy off the coast of North Carolina as it expands its campaign to block new offshore wind developments.

item.title: 📚 今日のGRIMピック【AIツール・ChatGPT】 ChatGPT・生成AI活用に関する書籍をお探しならAmaz…

item.description:
📚 今日のGRIMピック【AIツール・ChatGPT】

ChatGPT・生成AI活用に関する書籍をお探しならAmazonをチェック！
「ChatGPT仕事術」「プロンプトエンジニアリング入門」など

🛒 Amazonで探す 📦

#AIテックニュース #Amazon #生成AI #AI活用 #ChatGPT

item.title: Darializa Avila Chevalier, the Democratic congressional nomi…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Darializa Avila Chevalier, the Democratic congressional nominee endorsed by New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, maintained a since-deleted Twitter account with repeated sympathetic references to communism, Marxist ideology and Soviet figures, including Vladimir Lenin. https://cnn.it/4oWMRrE
item.content:encoded: Darializa Avila Chevalier, the Democratic congressional nominee endorsed by New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani, maintained a since-deleted Twitter account with repeated sympathetic references to communism, Marxist ideology and Soviet figures, including Vladimir Lenin. https://cnn.it/4oWMRrE

item.title: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naru…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 6月29日 月曜日☁☀️ 室温30.2℃ ３連勤終了なり。。。 明日は休みなり。。 今日も暑かった〜🫠 梅雨の晴れ間は…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
6月29日 月曜日☁☀️
室温30.2℃
３連勤終了なり。。。
明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった〜🫠
梅雨の晴れ間はいいけど、暑すぎる…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
item.content:encoded:
6月29日 月曜日☁☀️
室温30.2℃
３連勤終了なり。。。
明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった〜🫠
梅雨の晴れ間はいいけど、暑すぎる…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵

item.title: 今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀) It's my hubby birthday …
item.author: Hanachu (@dokikawahanachu.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀)

It's my hubby birthday so I drew his favourite, Katanagatari !

#art #artsky #fanart #katanagatari
#アナログ絵
item.content:encoded:
今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀)

It's my hubby birthday so I drew his favourite, Katanagatari !

item.title: Critics say TriNetX’s easy analyses of electronic medical re…
item.author: Science Magazine (@science.org)
item.description: Critics say TriNetX’s easy analyses of electronic medical records fuel quick-and-dirty publications from inexperienced authors. https://scim.ag/4xRLajq
item.content:encoded: Critics say TriNetX’s easy analyses of electronic medical records fuel quick-and-dirty publications from inexperienced authors. https://scim.ag/4xRLajq

item.title: A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue o…
item.author: Butterflies Katz ⓥ (@butterflieskatz.bsky.social)
item.description:
A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue of Liberty covering her eyes (in shame) in Roubaix, France (in 2025, just before July 4th).

Judith de Leeuw, also known as JDL #StreetArt, creates #murals worldwide (41 countries) to draw attention to social issues. info@jdlstreetart.com
item.content:encoded:
A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue of Liberty covering her eyes (in shame) in Roubaix, France (in 2025, just before July 4th).

Judith de Leeuw, also known as JDL #StreetArt, creates #murals worldwide (41 countries) to draw attention to social issues. info@jdlstreetart.com

item.title: Oho, Pentti Arajärvi käveli kaikki Helsingin kadut. Kirja ju…

item.content:encoded: Oho, Pentti Arajärvi käveli kaikki Helsingin kadut. Kirja julkaistaan ensi keskiviikkona kello 16:30 Rosebud-kirjakaupassa Kluuvissa. Haastattelen siellä Penttiä. Tervetuloa kaikki.

item.title: NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org

item.title: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. Thi…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. This was a cool experience! The movie told its story entirely through music and visuals, it was unique and well executed! The soundtrack was nice as well, and the art style was beautiful with a vibrant color palette! It was a pleasant movie 😊
item.content:encoded: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. This was a cool experience! The movie told its story entirely through music and visuals, it was unique and well executed! The soundtrack was nice as well, and the art style was beautiful with a vibrant color palette! It was a pleasant movie 😊

item.title: ‎なっ…なんと ‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦 ‎ ‎そして…説教💦 ‎ ‎『何よ！ ‎たかがイタズラDMで …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎なっ…なんと
‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦
‎
‎そして…説教💦
‎
‎『何よ！
‎たかがイタズラDMで
引っ込むなよ〜』
‎
‎『男でしょうよ！』
‎
‎✳️あんたら女でしょ？
‎
‎『でも…
毘沙門天はイケて無いね』
‎
‎『私はもっと可愛らしいよね…』
‎
‎✳️自分で言えるツワモノすぎる💦
‎
‎長女の言葉が強烈だった…
‎
‎『お父さん、
家族愛を堂々と言えることは
‎カッコいいよ』
‎
‎『負けるな
私のスーパーお父さん！』
‎
‎そして…焼肉を奢らされた💦

よー高い肉を食べるの〜🤣
✳️ダイエット中では😆
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎なっ…なんと
‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦
‎
‎そして…説教💦
‎
‎『何よ！
‎たかがイタズラDMで
引っ込むなよ〜』
‎
‎『男でしょうよ！』
‎
‎✳️あんたら女でしょ？
‎
‎『でも…
毘沙門天はイケて無いね』
‎
‎『私はもっと可愛らしいよね…』
‎
‎✳️自分で言えるツワモノすぎる💦
‎
‎長女の言葉が強烈だった…
‎
‎『お父さん、
家族愛を堂々と言えることは
‎カッコいいよ』
‎
‎『負けるな
私のスーパーお父さん！』
‎
‎そして…焼肉を奢らされた💦

よー高い肉を食べるの〜🤣
✳️ダイエット中では😆
‎
‎

item.title: #今月描いた絵を晒そう #fanart ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。 連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでく…
item.author: 羽成ふみ✍🏻お通販開店中（6月いっぱいまで） (@tokeruwakusei.bsky.social)
item.description:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#fanart
ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。
連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでくださってありがとうございました。）ステゴは次回があればもっと手癖もりもりで挑んでみたいです…。
item.content:encoded:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#fanart
ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。
連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでくださってありがとうございました。）ステゴは次回があればもっと手癖もりもりで挑んでみたいです…。

item.title: I'm reposting this photo of a beautiful spray can paintings …
item.author: Brad Holkesvig (@bradjholk.bsky.social)
item.description: I'm reposting this photo of a beautiful spray can paintings that includes some rollers and brush work too on the wall of an apartment building in northern Barcelona. I think it's one of the most fascinating paintings on a wall I have ever seen before. #SprayCanArt #Barcelona #Art #Photography
item.content:encoded: I'm reposting this photo of a beautiful spray can paintings that includes some rollers and brush work too on the wall of an apartment building in northern Barcelona. I think it's one of the most fascinating paintings on a wall I have ever seen before. #SprayCanArt #Barcelona #Art #Photography

item.title: "Everyone will be affected, not just scientists. Every commu…
item.author: The Verge (@theverge.com)
item.description:
"Everyone will be affected, not just scientists. Every community in the country.“

A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there’s still time to fight it.

Read more from @beebrookshire.bsky.social: www.theverge.com/science/9576...
item.content:encoded:
"Everyone will be affected, not just scientists. Every community in the country.“

A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there’s still time to fight it.

item.title: Der Kulturstaatsminister fordert die Hersteller von Fußballt…
item.author: Anne Rabe (@annerabe.bsky.social)
item.description:
Der Kulturstaatsminister fordert die Hersteller von Fußballtrikots auf, die Gewinnmargen etwa zu reduzieren, damit sich mehr Leute ein Fußballtrikot leisten können.

Ja. Das stimmt. Das hat er wirklich gesagt.
item.content:encoded:
Der Kulturstaatsminister fordert die Hersteller von Fußballtrikots auf, die Gewinnmargen etwa zu reduzieren, damit sich mehr Leute ein Fußballtrikot leisten können.

Ja. Das stimmt. Das hat er wirklich gesagt.

item.content:encoded:

item.title: Two things are true. The World Cup is the greatest sportin…
item.author: Dunning-Kruger Industries (@bbroke7.bsky.social)
item.description:
Two things are true.

The World Cup is the greatest sporting event. The fans, players, locals, and camaraderie make it so.

FIFA is the most corrupt sporting organization on the planet and they have only gotten worse despite everyone knowing.

Demand better from the people that control it

T
item.content:encoded:
Two things are true.

The World Cup is the greatest sporting event. The fans, players, locals, and camaraderie make it so.

FIFA is the most corrupt sporting organization on the planet and they have only gotten worse despite everyone knowing.

Demand better from the people that control it

T

Why Flavor Flav is betting on #SHEWeekend and why brands should too,!!
